caption_text: Model gateway · one entrypoint fans to the model pool, every tier converges on the shared cache; telemetry runs out-of-band

cards.dims_superseded: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14: hand-file width citations are ceilings — cards solve to their own ink + anchor pads; the hand file's wider cards are dress history

census_amendments.note: primer_diagram_language: call and telemetry ground as on-wire edge-chips (the specimen's 18-tall pills read as micro-labels under the 26-tall chip threshold) — an amendment over the earlier free-label reading; the render carries 2 edge-chips and 0 micro-labels. glyph_marks 6->7: the fast tier's lightning is a real identity mark the hand file drew as a bare path (uncounted by the extractor); the render counts its zap.

plate_amendment: plate bands not law: the sheet is top-packed with ~295px of dead band before its caption (content ends y187 of 500) — proportions unfinished; renders grade against family air
